reviews.author: Zickox

reviews.title: Quite usable!
reviews.content: Has some rough edges, but man, this project harkens back to Winamp and the days when software was fun. May this project be the standard bearer in the fight against techno-feudalism.
reviews.author: anchann84

reviews.title: Almost, almost
reviews.content:
It works

But

Sometimes it crashes, to me it happened when searching a song in the song submenu, then when i closed and reopened the app it showed a black screen, to fix i had to reinstall the app.

Downloads shouldn’t have a whole section of the application to themselves, i think it should be a small section in the homepage, since cached songs are only there to keep the possibility of listening to music even when offline.

The library section should be on par with the home section, also, it needs a lot more options to search for music, i mean, genres, recently added albums, recently played albums, favourites (songs, albums, artists), there’s too much friction when navigating to the song or album i want but don’t quite remember

Final note, why the hell are images low res, i worked so hard to get high quality covers for my library and i can’t enjoy them? C’mon…

Aside from these four points, the app works, but you must remember to setup the save login info, otherwise you’ll have to login every time you open the app. Lyrics i presume are WIP

I hope all i wrote will become obsolete and the app will work flawlessly, it gives a spin to the Navidrome iOS music player which Amperfy doesn’t have, since it’s so boring and “Just Works”

reviews.title: Extremely good music app
reviews.content: Flo is a great app with a very nice modern design and connects flawlessly to my Navidrome server. Only things is, I can’t stream my songs to my HomePod via AirPlay. I don’t know why it is so but the button is grey and disabled. Overall it’s a fantastic app to stream your music to your iPhone, without a need for any subscription whatsoever.
